chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 11 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 3017/2025. 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 30.03.2026. Mr. Shahriyar Zaidi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Petitioner submits that parties have reached a private Settlement, and therefore seeks to withdraw this Petition. As per his request, this Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith listed application. JUDGE AYAZ
